name: Burnt Sugar Buttercream Frosting Fhmn87a
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Burnt sugar syrup from cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter in a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat in the powdered sugar, salt, vanilla, and burnt sugar syrup until smooth.
3. Gradually add the cream to achieve a good consistency for spreading. Additional cream may be added as needed (up to 2 tablespoons or more).
